nasb.text: Even when they made for themselves A calf of molten metal And said, ‘This is your God Who brought you up from Egypt,’ And committed great blasphemies,

esv.text: Even when they had made for themselves a golden calf and said, ‘This is your God who brought you up out of Egypt,’ and had committed great blasphemies,

cnv.text: 他們更為自己鑄造了一頭牛犢的雕像， 說：‘這就是把你們從埃及領上來的神！’ 他們犯了褻瀆大罪，

ccb.text: 纵使他们为自己铸造了一头牛犊，声称那是把他们带出埃及的上帝，大大亵渎了你，
